calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Feb-01-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PETITIONER MBNA AMERICA BANK, N.A.'S Hearing Re: Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award: DENIED for failure to comply with CCP 1290.4; notice of the hearing and all supporting papers must be served by hand. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
